title: Green Gold Balloons Pack of 30 - 10 Inch Metallic Latex and Confetti Balloons for Jungle Safari Birthday, Wedding, Baby Shower Party Decoration
features: These combo balloons pack brings the magic of celebration for every occasion. The balloons pack contains pack of 30 balloons in total, the color of the balloons is green, gold and confetti balloons as well.

Tips of Balloon: You can blow them up with a mouth, pump or helium. After inflating, shake the confetti balloon and gently rub it with your hair or dry cloth to make the confetti stick to the side of the balloon, which can make the balloon look more beautiful.

Quality Balloons: Our birthday balloons are made of high-quality, safe, non-toxic latex. They are durable and reliable, and you don't need to worry about them tearing or bursting after inflation. They can be filled with air or helium. Our party balloons are vacuum-packed to prevent them from breaking easily, and they are safe for children to use and play with.
Applications: These balloons are perfect for birthday decorations, baby showers, christenings, gender reveal parties, boy’s birthday party decorations and wedding decorations

Attention: Please use a balloon pump to inflate these balloons. Certain color difference occurs after inflation, but the color effect will be better. Please DO NOT overfill the balloons and also avoid sunburn, overheat, pointed object and excessive friction.
